column1: # HARDENED (Defect A): determinism-provenance is NOT a stored state.json field
# (`expected_by` lives only in the fixture EXPECTED_FINDINGS.yaml). The
# eligibility gate (finding_eligible.sh) reads THIS table instead — a value that
# actually exists — seeded from the SPEC_1.4.0 §12 determinism sweep
#   (a) every slug below exists in the audit taxonomy;
#   deterministic — a regex/tool/fixture layer scores the finding mechanically;
#                   eligible to become autonomous rework (subject to the floor).
#   agent         — judgment is genuinely required (§12 "kept agent-scored");
# RECONCILIATION NOTE (log-only-refund): the RL register's example list called
# LOG-ONLY-vs-DARK distinction is a semantic emission judgment; only its seed
# half — refund_payment ∈ vital_candidates ∧ ∉ telemetry — is deterministic).
# We follow §12 (which V10 pins): agent. The loop therefore leaves it
# comment-only, exactly the ADR-0017 Defect-H posture for agent-scored money
# slugs — it does NOT autonomously escalate an agent-scored money-path fix.
# layer) are agent-scored but have "no lexical [slug] form" (§12 MN1). They are
# left out rather than pinned to a phantom slug; an unknown slug fails safe to
# (no drain either way). Adding them later is a red-first TSV change, not a fix.
